message:
test: update decision plane and stress tests for new guardrail defaults

Adjust warmup observation count from 15 to 35 to satisfy the raised
min_observations=30 default in decision plane tests. Fix
stress_decision_plane_drift to set pressure non-green and call
evaluate() during drift injection so FallbackSafe transition is
properly exercised.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
